# scripts/lib/datafmt.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:18Z

## Purpose
datafmt.py — minimum-valid file writers for the 10 mandatory formats.

Stdlib only. Each writer produces a SPEC-VALID file that downstream tools
(libreoffice, ffplay, image viewers, parsers) can open without error,
even though the content is a placeholder sample.

Per global §82.2. Reference implementation for every project's
sample-data generator.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import csv
- from `_` import io
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import math
- from `_` import struct
- from `_` import wave
- from `_` import xml.etree.ElementTree
- from `_` import zipfile
- from `_` import zlib

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `write_csv(path, columns, rows)`: Write columns + rows as CSV. Returns byte count.
- `write_json(path, payload)`: (no docstring)
- `write_xml(path, root_name, rows)`: (no docstring)
- `write_text(path, content)`: (no docstring)
- `write_docx(path, paragraphs)`: Minimum-valid .docx (Word, LibreOffice, Pages all open it).
- `write_pdf(path, lines)`: Hand-rolled minimum-valid PDF 1.4 with one page of text.
- `write_png(path, width, height, color)`: Solid-color PNG. Valid PNG signature + IHDR + IDAT + IEND chunks.
- `_png_chunk(tag, data)`: (no docstring)
- `write_wav(path, seconds, freq, rate)`: Single-channel 16-bit PCM. By default a 1s 440Hz tone.
- `write_mp4(path)`: Minimal MP4 container — ftyp + free + moov stub.
- `_mp4_box(box_type, payload)`: (no docstring)
- `_save(path, data)`: (no docstring)
- `_xml_escape(s)`: (no docstring)
- `is_valid(path)`: Best-effort signature check for the 10 formats.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- ---------- text formats ------------------------------------------------------
- ElementTree.tostring with declaration:
- ---------- docx -------------------------------------------------------------
- ---------- pdf --------------------------------------------------------------
- Build the page content stream
